name: Project.Commander.BsToolExecution.Feature_AtomicGateCheck
observations: Atomic gate check pattern prevents parallel BsTool execution in Print All Nodes workflow using threading.Lock for check-and-set operation.
Architecture: BsToolCommandService.try_acquire_execution() atomically checks is_executing flag and sets if idle, returns bool success.
Integration: NodeTreePresenter.process_node_print_commands() calls try_acquire_execution() before Phase 3, defers with QTimer.singleShot(100ms) if busy.
created:2025-10-11,modified:2025-10-11,refs:0

name: Project.Commander.BsToolExecution.Method_TryAcquireExecution
observations: Thread-safe atomic operation using with execution_lock: check is_executing, set True if False, return acquired status.
Implementation: BsToolCommandService.try_acquire_execution() at bstool_command_service.py lines 37-49 uses threading.Lock for mutual exclusion.
Usage pattern: Caller uses if not try_acquire_execution(): defer_retry(); return to prevent execution if busy, eliminates check-then-act race.
created:2025-10-11,modified:2025-10-11,refs:0

name: Project.Commander.BsToolExecution.Method_ReleaseExecution
observations: Resets is_executing flag using threading.Lock for thread-safe state release after BsTool process completes.
Implementation: BsToolCommandService.release_execution() at bstool_command_service.py lines 51-62 called in _run_bstool_process finally block.
Error handling: Called in all exit paths - success completion, exception during setup, no-op cases (no LOG tokens, early return).
created:2025-10-11,modified:2025-10-11,refs:0

name: Project.Commander.BsToolExecution.Pattern_CheckThenActRaceCondition
observations: Race condition occurs when multiple threads check shared state before any thread modifies it - all see idle, all proceed simultaneously.
Solution: Atomic check-and-set using threading.Lock ensures only ONE thread passes gate check by making read-modify operation indivisible.
Example: Gate check at line 1010 (check is_executing) separated from line 82 (set is_executing) created window where Node2 timer fires while Node1 still setting up.
created:2025-10-11,modified:2025-10-11,refs:0

name: Project.Commander.BsToolExecution.Pattern_AtomicLockPattern
observations: Threading pattern: Separate execution_lock for gate control, distinct from process_lock for subprocess management - clear separation of concerns.
Implementation steps: 1) Add lock in __init__, 2) Create atomic try_acquire/release methods, 3) Update callers to use atomic methods, 4) Ensure release in all exits.
Benefits: Thread-safe without encapsulation violation, reusable for other sequential operations, minimal changes to existing codebase architecture.
created:2025-10-11,modified:2025-10-11,refs:0

name: Project.Commander.BsToolExecution.Pattern_DeferredRetry
observations: Non-blocking retry mechanism using QTimer.singleShot(100ms, lambda: retry_function) allows UI responsiveness while waiting for resource availability.
Integration: Combined with atomic acquire - if try_acquire_execution() returns False, schedule deferred retry instead of blocking or failing.
Workflow: Node1 acquires→executes→releases, Node2 tries→fails→defers→retries→succeeds after Node1 releases, maintains sequential processing.
created:2025-10-11,modified:2025-10-11,refs:0
